## Summary

*What does this PR change? One paragraph maximum.*

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Correction (factual error fix — no change to constraint meaning)
- [ ] Clarification (rewording for precision — no change to constraint meaning)
- [ ] Gap fill (new constraint or risk signal added)
- [ ] New constraint domain
- [ ] Documentation / formatting only

---

*What production failure mode does this change address or improve coverage of?*

**Failure mode:**

**Evidence (post-mortem link, benchmark, or incident reference):**

---

## Constraint Checklist

- [ ] All constraints use RFC 2119 language (`MUST` / `MUST NOT`)
- [ ] Each constraint has exactly one failure mode statement
- [ ] No existing constraint has been softened without documented justification
- [ ] Markdown linting passes locally (`markdownlint "**/*.md"`)
- [ ] The change is grounded in evidence, not preference

---

## Breaking Change?

Does this PR change the meaning of an existing constraint (MAJOR version bump)?

- [ ] Yes — existing constraint meaning has changed. Justification:
- [ ] No — this is additive or a clarification only
